title: [The Broken Lands, Cavern]
description: The ceiling and floor of this small cavern are dotted with stalactites and stalagmites of various sizes.  Near one wall of the cavern, a particularly large stalactite dips down from the ceiling of the cavern, almost touching the tip of a matching stalagmite that rises from the cavern floor.

wayto.6626: ;e unless checkloot.include? 'stairs'; fput 'turn stalactite'; fput 'turn stalagmite'; end; move 'go stair'
